use_cases: Landing page or hero section backgrounds with a subtle radial gradient effect
Decorative background overlay for cards and containers
Page-level background for SaaS landing pages and marketing sites
Clean, modern background for light-themed interfaces
Subtle visual depth layer behind content sections
ai_summary: A lightweight React background component that renders a radial gradient from the center-top of the viewport, transitioning from white to a vibrant green accent. Designed for use as a decorative backdrop in landing pages, hero sections, and light-themed interfaces. Fully responsive and requires no state management.
